General.Name: Miliboo SA
General.Description: Miliboo Société anonyme engages in the design and sale of modular and customizable furniture in Paris and internationally. The company offers sofas, couches, armchairs, chairs, benches, stools, ottomans, bookcases, shelves, desks, consoles, tables, buffet and convenient furniture, shoe cabinets, entrance furniture, TV stands and cabinets, sectional TV units, adult's and children's beds, nightstands, cupboards, bedheads, mattresses, child storage furniture, garden furniture, table lamps, suspension lighting solutions, street lamps, wall decoration products, decorative objects and cushions, screens, carpets, and children's accessories. It also provides furniture for animals, such as dog and cat kennels. The company sells its products through its online platform miliboo.com as well as physical points of sale located in Paris and Lyon. Miliboo Société anonyme was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Chavanod, France.
